revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大祭]]
'''Grand Festival''' (大祭, Taisai, Omatsuri)
* The main festivals of {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}. Notably, those of the {{ill|Ise Shrine|en|Ise Shrine|qid=Q687168|lt=Ise Grand Shrine|1=Ise Grand Shrine}}: the {{ill|Kinen-sai|en|Kinen-sai|qid=Q118906710|lt=Kinensai (Prayer Festival)|1=Kinensai}}, {{ill|Kannamesai (Clothing Festival)|ja|神衣祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannamesai (Clothing Festival)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|lt=Tsukinamisai (Monthly Festival)|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}}, {{ill|Kannamesai Festival|en|Kannamesai Festival|qid=Q11255045|lt=Kanname-sai (First Fruits Offering)|1=Kannamesai Festival}}, {{ill|Niiname-no-Matsuri|en|Niiname-no-Matsuri|qid=Q11501518|lt=Niinamesai (Harvest Festival)|1=Niiname-no-Matsuri}}, {{ill|Sengū|lt=Sengū Festival|ja|遷宮祭|lt_ja=遷宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Rinji Hōbeisai (Special Offering Ceremony)|ja|臨時奉幣祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinji Hōbeisai (Special Offering Ceremony)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * Among the {{ill|Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace|en|Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace|qid=Q11453226|lt=Ceremonies of the Japanese Imperial Palace|1=Ritual ceremonies of the Imperial Palace}}, those personally performed by the {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}}. Currently, these include the {{ill|Genshi-sai|lt=Genshi-sai (New Year's First Ceremony)|ja|元始祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshi-sai|qq=}}, {{ill|Previous Emperor Festival|lt=Previous Emperor Festival|lt=Previous Emperor's Festival|ja|先帝祭|lt=Sentei-sai (Emperor Showa Ceremony)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Previous Emperor's Festival|qq=}} ({{ill|Hirohito|ja|昭和天皇祭|lt=Showa Emperor Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirohito|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), the Spring {{ill|Kōreisai|en|Kōreisai|qid=Q6455253|lt=Kōreisai (Ancestral Spirits Festival)|1=Kōreisai}} and Spring {{ill|Shinden-sai|lt=Shinden-sai|lt=Shrine Festival|lt=Shinden-sai (Shrine Festival)|ja|神殿祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Festival|qq=}}, {{ill|Emperor Jimmu Festival|lt=Jimmu Tenno-sai (Emperor Jimmu Ceremony)|ja|神武天皇祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jimmu Festival|qq=}}, the Autumn Kōreisai and Autumn Shinden-sai, the Kanname-sai, the Niiname-sai, the {{ill|Shikinen-sai|ja|式年祭|lt=Triennial Ceremonies|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinen-sai|qq=}} of the three generations of emperors preceding the current one, the triennial ceremonies of the former empress, and those of the mother of the current empress. Prior to 1948, this also included the {{ill|Kigensetsu|lt=Kigensetsu (National Foundation Day Festival)|ja|紀元節|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kigensetsu|qq=}}<ref name="皇室祭祀">{{Cite book |和書 |url=https://kotobank.jp/word/皇室祭祀-62192#E7.99.BE.E7.A7.91.E4.BA.8B.E5.85.B8.E3.83.9E.E3.82.A4.E3.83.9A.E3.83.87.E3.82.A3.E3.82.A2|title=Imperial Court Ceremonies (Kōshitsu Saishi)|publisher={{ill|Kotobank|en|Kotobank|qid=Q11302260|lt=Kotobank|1=Kotobank}} |author={{ill|Heibonsha|en|Heibonsha|qid=Q11482108|lt=Heibonsha|1=Heibonsha}} {{ill|Heibonsha World Encyclopedia|en|Heibonsha World Encyclopedia|qid=Q5698601|lt=World Encyclopedia|1=Heibonsha World Encyclopedia}} }}</ref>. * An older term for {{ill|Reisai|lt=Reisai (Regular Shrine Festivals)|ja|例祭|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reisai|qq=}}, previously called Ōmatsuri (おおまつり). * The {{ill|Eastern Orthodox Church#Feasts|ja|正教会#祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Orthodox Church#Feasts|1=Eastern Orthodox Church|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q35032}} major festivals, such as the {{ill|Paschal Feast|ja|復活大祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Paschal Feast|1=Pascha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489396}} and the {{ill|Great feasts in the Eastern Orthodox Church|en|Great feasts in the Eastern Orthodox Church|qid=Q1402000|lt=Twelve Great Feasts|1=Great feasts in the Eastern Orthodox Church}}.
== Notes == {{footnotes}} {{Reflist}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|大祭|version=99363706|comment=Imported full ja history}}
